outlet_trend_analysis

Bella Oleksy

2024-11-19

Some notes at the top about data processing

Flux estimates– For each day, I have a solute concentration and a discharge value solute = mg/L; discharge = m3/s

Concentrations are interpolated between weeks as in Mast et al. 2014 ES&T

  • [mg/L] * [m3/s] * [1000L/m3] * [86400s/day] = units of [kg/week]
  • Divide by the area of the watershed (660ha) and you get [kg/ha/week]
  • From there I summed across all weeks to get all annual yields (kg/ha/yr)
  • What could be going wrong?

Missing data:

Missing data are sprinkled throughout, but basically a non-issue. I interpolated between weeks with missing data where necessary but this is extremely rare after 1991. We do not have data past 2023 in the database yet.
